---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

::: page-header
# Research & Publications
:::

::: jump-nav
[Current focus](#current-research-focus){.jump-link}
[Supervisory team](#supervisory-team){.jump-link}
[Publications](#publications){.jump-link}
[Peer review](#peer-review){.jump-link}
[Recent reading](#recent-reading){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current research focus

My present research centres on school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) — the subset of school non-attendance driven by emotional distress rather than truancy or parent-condoned absence. This forms the basis of my PhD by publication, which comprises three interlinked empirical papers.

::: phd-status-strip
::: phd-status-item
[Ethics]{.status-label} [Approved]{.status-value .status-good}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Data access]{.status-label} [Granted]{.status-value .status-good}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 1]{.status-label} [Manuscript in progress]{.status-value .status-WIP}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 2]{.status-label} [Variable selection & methods]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Paper 3]{.status-label} [Data granted; pending]{.status-value}
:::

::: phd-status-item
[Estimated completion]{.status-label} [2027]{.status-value .status-goal}
:::
:::

::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
[Paper 1]{.paper-label}

### Systematic review

A [PROSPERO-registered](https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251089918){.prospero-badge} systematic review and narrative synthesis of interventions for emotionally based school avoidance, examining construct definitions, outcome operationalisation, and intervention targets.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 2]{.paper-label}

### Longitudinal modelling

Examining how patterns of school attendance develop across childhood and early adolescence using large-scale Australian longitudinal cohort data (LSAC).
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 3]{.paper-label}

### Population-level attendance

Exploring system-level patterns in school attendance and non-attendance using national education data, with attention to how administrative reporting shapes the visibility of EBSA.
:::
:::

## Supervisory team

::: supervisor-row
[Dr Daniel Zarate](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1508-8637){.supervisor-link} [A/Prof Vasileios Stavropoulos](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6964-4662){.supervisor-link} [Dr Taylor Brown](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9814-3832){.supervisor-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
/* Publications layout */
.pub-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.pub-main { min-width: 0; }
.pub-sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 80px;
}
.sidebar-section {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.sidebar-label {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.sidebar-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.sidebar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
}
.sidebar-link:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  border-color: var(--navy);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.pub-year-head {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border);
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
}
.pub-entry-block {
  padding: 1rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.pub-entry-block:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.pub-favicon {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  object-fit: contain;
  padding: 3px;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.pub-favicon-fallback {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 2px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.pub-entry-text {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}
.pub-title-link {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.55;
  display: inline;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  background-image: linear-gradient(var(--accent), var(--accent));
  background-size: 0% 1px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: left bottom;
  transition: background-size 0.25s ease, color 0.15s;
}
.pub-title-link:hover {
  color: var(--accent) !important;
  background-size: 100% 1px;
}
.pub-journal-link {
  display: inline;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}
.pub-journal-link:hover { color: var(--accent) !important; }
.pub-meta-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.pub-cite-btn {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.6rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  white-space: nowrap;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.pub-cite-btn:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  border-color: var(--navy);
  color: var(--navy);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.pub-cite-btn.copied {
  background: #e8f5ee;
  border-color: #2d7a4f;
  color: #2d7a4f;
}
.pub-loading {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  padding: 1rem 0;
}
.pub-section-heading {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--navy);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 0;
}
.pub-footer-row {
  margin-top: 1.75rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding-top: 1rem;
}
.pub-synced-note {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.pub-synced-note a {
  color: var(--text-muted);
  text-decoration: underline;
}
.pub-scholar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s;
}
.pub-scholar-link:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  border-color: var(--navy);
}

/* Peer review section */
.peer-review-section {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.peer-review-section h2 {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--navy);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.peer-review-section p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #2a2a2a;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .pub-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .pub-sidebar { display: none; }
}
</style>

<div class="pub-layout">

  <!-- Main: Publications + Peer review -->
  <div class="pub-main">

    <h2 id="publications" class="pub-section-heading">Publications</h2>

    <div id="orcid-pubs">
      <p class="pub-loading">Loading publications from ORCID…</p>
    </div>

    <div class="peer-review-section">
      <h2 id="peer-review">Peer review</h2>
      <p>I contribute to peer review for journals in psychology, behavioural science, and digital health. Recent reviews include work for <em>Behaviour &amp; Information Technology</em> and <em>Scientific Reports</em>.</p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Sidebar -->
  <div class="pub-sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-section">
      <span class="sidebar-label">Find me online</span>
      <div class="sidebar-links">
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
        <a href="https://digitalminds.au/connor-conkey-morrison/" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">DigitalMinds</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/ccicm" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
const ORCID_ID = '0009-0000-1020-2333';
const SCHOLAR_URL = 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en';
const MAX_PUBS = 6;

// ─── Publisher lookups ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const DOI_DOMAINS = {
  '10.1016': 'elsevier.com', '10.1007': 'springer.com', '10.1038': 'nature.com',
  '10.1186': 'biomedcentral.com', '10.1002': 'wiley.com', '10.1111': 'wiley.com',
  '10.1080': 'tandfonline.com', '10.4324': 'routledge.com', '10.1037': 'apa.org',
  '10.1027': 'hogrefe.com', '10.1177': 'sagepub.com', '10.1093': 'oup.com',
  '10.1017': 'cambridge.org', '10.1371': 'plos.org', '10.1136': 'bmj.com',
  '10.3389': 'frontiersin.org', '10.3390': 'mdpi.com', '10.1521': 'guilford.com',
  '10.1159': 'karger.com', '10.1515': 'degruyter.com', '10.1108': 'emerald.com',
};

// ─── Journal URL via Crossref ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Crossref returns structured metadata per DOI including publisher links.
// We extract the best journal-level URL from the response.
async function fetchJournalUrl(doi) {
  if (!doi) return null;
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com`, {
      headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
    });
    if (!res.ok) return null;
    const data = await res.json();
    const work = data?.message;
    if (!work) return null;

    // 1. Prefer explicit journal URL from links array
    const links = work.link || [];
    for (const l of links) {
      if (l['content-type'] === 'unspecified' && l.URL?.includes('journal')) return l.URL;
    }

    // 2. Use ISSN + publisher to construct a reliable URL
    const issns = work.ISSN || [];
    const publisher = (work.publisher || '').toLowerCase();

    if (issns.length > 0) {
      const issn = issns[0];

      if (publisher.includes('elsevier') || publisher.includes('sciencedirect')) {
        // Elsevier: use journal slug from DOI if available, else ISSN search
        const m = doi.match(/10\.1016\/j\.([a-z]+)\./);
        if (m) return `https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/${m[1]}`;
        return `https://www.sciencedirect.com/search?qs=&pub=${encodeURIComponent(work['container-title']?.[0] || '')}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('springer') || publisher.includes('nature')) {
        return `https://link.springer.com/search?query=&search-within=Journal&facet-journal-id=${issn}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('wiley')) {
        return `https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/${issn.replace('-','')}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('taylor') || publisher.includes('routledge') || publisher.includes('informa')) {
        return `https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/${issn}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('sage')) {
        return `https://journals.sagepub.com/home/${issn}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('oxford') || publisher.includes('oup')) {
        const slug = (work['container-title']?.[0] || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-');
        return `https://academic.oup.com/${slug}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('american psychological') || publisher.includes('apa ')) {
        return `https://www.apa.org/pubs/journals/${issn}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('frontiers')) {
        const slug = (work['container-title']?.[0] || '').toLowerCase().replace('frontiers in ','').replace(/\s+/g,'-');
        return `https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/${slug}`;
      }
      if (publisher.includes('plos')) {
        return `https://journals.plos.org/plosone/`;
      }
    }

    // 3. Fall back to publisher URL if present
    if (work['publisher-location']) return null;

    return null;
  } catch { return null; }
}

// ─── Favicon / fallback ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function getBookSvg() { const c = (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c05a4a'; return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`; }

function pubIconHtml(doi) {
  const domain = doi ? (DOI_DOMAINS[doi.split('/')[0]] || null) : null;
  if (domain) {
    return `<img class="pub-favicon" src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=${domain}&sz=64" alt="${domain}" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex';"/><div class="pub-favicon-fallback" style="display:none;">${getBookSvg()}</div>`;
  }
  return `<div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div>`;
}

// ─── Author formatting ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function formatAuthorsApa(contributors) {
  if (!contributors || contributors.length === 0) return 'Conkey-Morrison, C.';
  const names = contributors
    .filter(c => c.role === 'author' || !c.role)
    .map(c => {
      const credit = c['credit-name']?.value || '';
      if (!credit) return null;
      // Try to reformat "Firstname Lastname" → "Lastname, F."
      const parts = credit.trim().split(/\s+/);
      if (parts.length >= 2) {
        const last = parts[parts.length - 1];
        const initials = parts.slice(0, -1).map(p => p[0].toUpperCase() + '.').join(' ');
        return `${last}, ${initials}`;
      }
      return credit;
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (names.length === 0) return 'Conkey-Morrison, C.';
  if (names.length <= 20) return names.join(', ');
  // APA 7: list first 19, then ellipsis, then last author
  return names.slice(0, 19).join(', ') + ', … ' + names[names.length - 1];
}

// ─── Citation builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function makeApaPlain(w) {
  const authors = w.authors || 'Conkey-Morrison, C.';
  const doi = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '';
  const vol = w.volume ? `, ${w.volume}` : '';
  const issue = w.issue ? `(${w.issue})` : '';
  const pages = w.pages ? `, ${w.pages}` : '';
  const journal = w.journal
    ? `${w.journal}${vol}${issue}${pages}. `
    : '';
  return `${authors} (${w.year}). ${w.title}. ${journal}${doi}`;
}

function makeRis(w) {
  const authorLines = (w.authors || 'Conkey-Morrison, Connor')
    .split(', ')
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map(a => `AU  - ${a}`)
    .join('\r\n');
  return [
    'TY  - JOUR',
    authorLines,
    `TI  - ${w.title}`,
    w.journal ? `JO  - ${w.journal}` : '',
    w.year    ? `PY  - ${w.year}`    : '',
    w.volume  ? `VL  - ${w.volume}`  : '',
    w.issue   ? `IS  - ${w.issue}`   : '',
    w.pages   ? `SP  - ${w.pages}`   : '',
    w.doi     ? `DO  - ${w.doi}`     : '',
    w.doi     ? `UR  - https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '',
    'ER  - ',
  ].filter(Boolean).join('\r\n');
}

// ─── Global store + button handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────
const PUB_WORKS = [];

function copyApa(idx) {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(makeApaPlain(PUB_WORKS[idx])).then(() => {
    const btn = document.getElementById(`cite-btn-${idx}`);
    if (btn) {
      btn.textContent = 'Copied!';
      btn.classList.add('copied');
      setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy APA 7'; btn.classList.remove('copied'); }, 2000);
    }
  });
}

function downloadRisById(idx) {
  const w = PUB_WORKS[idx];
  const blob = new Blob([makeRis(w)], { type: 'application/x-research-info-systems' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = w.title.slice(0, 40).replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_').toLowerCase() + '.ris';
  a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

// ─── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderWorks(works, fromOrcid) {
  PUB_WORKS.length = 0;
  works.forEach(w => PUB_WORKS.push(w));

  const byYear = {};
  works.forEach(w => {
    const y = w.year || 'n.d.';
    if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = [];
    byYear[y].push(w);
  });

  let html = '';
  let idx = 0;
  for (const year of Object.keys(byYear).sort((a, b) => b - a)) {
    html += `<span class="pub-year-head">${year}</span>`;
    for (const w of byYear[year]) {
      const articleHref = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '#';
      const jUrl = w.journalUrl || articleHref;
      const i = idx++;
      html += `
        <div class="pub-entry-block">
          ${pubIconHtml(w.doi)}
          <div class="pub-entry-text">
            <a href="${articleHref}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${w.title}</a>
            <div class="pub-meta-row">
              ${w.journal ? `<a href="${jUrl}" target="_blank" class="pub-journal-link">${w.journal}</a>` : ''}
              <button id="cite-btn-${i}" class="pub-cite-btn" onclick="copyApa(${i})">Copy APA 7</button>
              <button class="pub-cite-btn" onclick="downloadRisById(${i})">Download RIS</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>`;
    }
  }

  // Footer: synced note + Scholar link
  const footer = document.createElement('div');
  footer.className = 'pub-footer-row';

  const syncNote = fromOrcid
    ? `<span class="pub-synced-note">Synced from <a href="https://orcid.org/${ORCID_ID}" target="_blank">ORCID</a> · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-AU',{day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'})}</span>`
    : `<span class="pub-synced-note">Showing recent publications</span>`;

  const scholarLink = `<a href="${SCHOLAR_URL}" target="_blank" class="pub-scholar-link">View all on Google Scholar →</a>`;

  footer.innerHTML = syncNote + scholarLink;

  // Return html string + append footer node after insertion
  return { html, footer };
}

// ─── Fetch full work record (ORCID authors + Crossref journal URL in parallel) ─
async function fetchFullWork(putCode, doi) {
  const [orcidResult, jUrl] = await Promise.all([
    (async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/work/${putCode}`, {
          headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
        });
        if (!res.ok) return null;
        const data = await res.json();
        const contributors = data?.contributors?.contributor || [];
        return {
          authors: formatAuthorsApa(contributors),
          volume: data?.['biblio']?.volume || null,
          issue:  data?.['biblio']?.issue  || null,
          pages:  data?.['biblio']?.['start-page']
            ? (data['biblio']['end-page']
                ? `${data['biblio']['start-page']}–${data['biblio']['end-page']}`
                : data['biblio']['start-page'])
            : null,
        };
      } catch { return null; }
    })(),
    fetchJournalUrl(doi),
  ]);

  return {
    authors:    orcidResult?.authors || null,
    volume:     orcidResult?.volume  || null,
    issue:      orcidResult?.issue   || null,
    pages:      orcidResult?.pages   || null,
    journalUrl: jUrl                 || null,
  };
}

// ─── Main loader ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function loadOrcidPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById('orcid-pubs');
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/works`, {
      headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
    });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    const data = await res.json();

    const summaries = [];
    for (const group of data.group || []) {
      const summary = group['work-summary']?.[0];
      if (!summary) continue;
      const title = summary.title?.title?.value || 'Untitled';
      const year = parseInt(summary['publication-date']?.year?.value) || 0;
      const journal = summary['journal-title']?.value || '';
      let doi = null;
      for (const eid of summary['external-ids']?.['external-id'] || []) {
        if (eid['external-id-type'] === 'doi') { doi = eid['external-id-value']; break; }
      }
      summaries.push({ title, year, journal, doi, putCode: summary['put-code'] });
    }

    if (summaries.length === 0) throw new Error('empty');

    summaries.sort((a, b) => b.year - a.year);
    const top = summaries.slice(0, MAX_PUBS);

    const fullRecords = await Promise.all(top.map(s => fetchFullWork(s.putCode, s.doi)));

    const works = top.map((s, i) => ({
      ...s,
      authors:    fullRecords[i]?.authors    || null,
      volume:     fullRecords[i]?.volume     || null,
      issue:      fullRecords[i]?.issue      || null,
      pages:      fullRecords[i]?.pages      || null,
      journalUrl: fullRecords[i]?.journalUrl || (s.doi ? `https://doi.org/${s.doi}` : null),
    }));

    const { html, footer } = renderWorks(works, true);
    container.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(footer);

  } catch (e) {
    const fallback = [
      { title: 'Incremental Validity of Cognitive Impulsivity, Emotional Impulsivity, and Sensation Seeking in the Predictions of ADHD Inattention and Hyperactivity/Impulsivity Symptoms in Adults', year: 2025, journal: 'Journal of Psychopathology and Behavioral Assessment', doi: '10.1007/s10862-025-10252-6', authors: 'Stavropoulos, V., Conkey-Morrison, C., Gomez, R., Griffiths, M. D.', journalUrl: 'https://link.springer.com/journal/10862' },
      { title: 'Stress-coping mechanisms and problematic social media use: A network analysis and differences across men and women', year: 2025, journal: 'Computers in Human Behavior Reports', doi: '10.1016/j.chbr.2025.100848', authors: 'Conkey-Morrison, C., Stavropoulos, V.', journalUrl: 'https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/chbr' },
      { title: 'Flowing in the net of disordered gaming: A network analysis approach', year: 2025, journal: 'Addictive Behaviors Reports', doi: '10.1016/j.abrep.2025.100606', authors: 'Stavropoulos, V., Conkey-Morrison, C., Griffiths, M. D.', journalUrl: 'https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/abrep' },
      { title: 'Examining how gamers connect with their avatars to assess their anxiety: A novel artificial intelligence approach', year: 2024, journal: 'Acta Psychologica', doi: '10.1016/j.actpsy.2024.104298', authors: 'Stavropoulos, V., Conkey-Morrison, C., Griffiths, M. D.', journalUrl: 'https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/acta-psychologica' },
    ];
    const { html, footer } = renderWorks(fallback, false);
    container.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(footer);
  }
}

loadOrcidPublications();
</script>
```

## Recent reading

Papers I've read recently — collaborator work, methodological references, and things worth knowing about.

```{=html}
<div id="reading-list"><p class="pub-loading">Loading…</p></div>

<script>
(async function() {
  const MAX_READING = 5;
  const container = document.getElementById('reading-list');

  // Load the JSON list
  let entries = [];
  try {
    const res = await fetch('../data/reading.json');
    entries = await res.json();
  } catch {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Could not load reading list.</p>';
    return;
  }

  if (!entries.length) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Nothing here yet.</p>';
    return;
  }

  const shown = entries.slice(0, MAX_READING);
  const rest  = entries.slice(MAX_READING);

  // Fetch Crossref metadata for all shown entries in parallel
  async function fetchMeta(doi) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com`);
      if (!res.ok) return null;
      const data = await res.json();
      const w = data.message;
      const authors = (w.author || []).slice(0, 5).map(a => {
        const last = a.family || '';
        const init = a.given ? a.given[0] + '.' : '';
        return `${last}, ${init}`.trim().replace(/,$/, '');
      }).join(', ') + ((w.author || []).length > 5 ? ', et al.' : '');
      return {
        title: w.title?.[0] || 'Untitled',
        journal: w['container-title']?.[0] || '',
        year: w.published?.['date-parts']?.[0]?.[0] || '',
        authors,
        url: `https://doi.org/${doi}`,
      };
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  function renderCard(meta, note, doi) {
    const url = meta ? meta.url : `https://doi.org/${doi}`;
    const title = meta ? meta.title : doi;
    const journal = meta ? [meta.authors, meta.year, meta.journal].filter(Boolean).join(' · ') : '';
    return `
      <div class="pub-entry-block">
        <div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div>
        <div class="pub-entry-text">
          <a href="${url}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${title}</a>
          ${journal ? `<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.2rem;font-style:italic;">${journal}</div>` : ''}
          ${note ? `<div style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.35rem;line-height:1.6;">${note}</div>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }

  const metas = await Promise.all(shown.map(e => fetchMeta(e.doi)));

  let html = shown.map((e, i) => renderCard(metas[i], e.note, e.doi)).join('');

  if (rest.length) {
    const restMetas = await Promise.all(rest.map(e => fetchMeta(e.doi)));
    const restHtml = rest.map((e, i) => renderCard(restMetas[i], e.note, e.doi)).join('');
    html += `
      <div id="reading-more" style="display:none;">${restHtml}</div>
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('reading-more').style.display='block';this.style.display='none';" class="pub-cite-btn" style="margin-top:0.75rem;">Show ${rest.length} more</button>`;
  }

  container.innerHTML = html;
})();
</script>
```
